channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [VIPUL] Vipul Limited's Managing Director, CEO & CFO Arrested by Economic Offences Wing, Gurugram
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Vipul Limited has informed the exchange about the material information under Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR Reg. 2015. Mr. Punit Beriwala, Managing Director, CEO & CFO of the Company, has been arrested on 27.02.2026 by Economic Offcences Wing, Gurugram in relation to alleged offences pertaining to FIR No 544/2024. The Company is in the process of obtaining further details and will provide additional information as and when required and available, in compliance with applicable regulations. The arrest is in the nature of a personal proceeding against Mr. Punit Beriwala, and at this stage, the Company’s operations continue in the normal course. The Board/appropriate committee is evaluating suitable interim arrangements for the management of the affairs of the Company and any further decisions in this regard shall be intimated separately.

  • Mr. Punit Beriwala, Managing Director, CEO & CFO of Vipul Limited arrested by Economic Offences Wing, Gurugram.
  • Arrest is in relation to alleged offences pertaining to FIR No 544/2024.
  • Company is obtaining further details and will provide additional information as required.
  • Company's operations continue in the normal course.
  • Board/appropriate committee is evaluating suitable interim arrangements for the management of the Company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VIPUL LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [SENORES] Senores Pharmaceuticals Issues Corporate Guarantee for Subsidiary's Credit Facilities from HDFC Bank
item.description:
Senores Pharmaceuticals Limited, a company committed to Global Wellness, has issued a corporate guarantee for additional credit facilities availed by its material subsidiary, Havix Group Inc. D/B/A Aavis Pharmaceuticals, USA, from HDFC Bank Limited. The guarantee is for an amount of up to USD 1,500,000/- (US Dollars One Million Five Hundred Thousand Only). The guarantee is at arm's length and is valid till the closure of the credit facilities or the tenure of the credit facilities, whichever is earlier. The maximum tenure of credit facilities is 10 (ten) years. At this point, there is no impact of this guarantee on the Company other than disclosure in the financial statements as a Contingent Liability.

  • Senores Pharmaceuticals issues corporate guarantee for subsidiary's credit facilities
  • Guarantee amount: USD 1,500,000/-
  • Guarantee issued in favor of HDFC Bank
  • Guarantee validity: Till closure of credit facilities or tenure of credit facilities, whichever is earlier
  • Maximum tenure of credit facilities: 10 years

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Senores Pharmaceuticals Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [LLOYDSTEEL] Lloyds Engineering Works Ltd Subsidiary Techno Industries Private Limited Shifts Registered Office from Gujarat to Maharashtra
item.description:
Lloyds Engineering Works Ltd announced that its wholly owned subsidiary, Techno Industries Private Limited, has received an order approving the shifting of its registered office from the State of Gujarat to the State of Maharashtra. The shifting is proposed to carry on the business more economically, efficiently and with better operational convenience. The shifting will be effective upon filing of the certified copy of the Order with the Registrar of Companies of both the States and issuance of a fresh Certificate of Incorporation by the Registrar of Companies. The aforesaid shifting does not impact the Listed entity.

  • Lloyds Engineering Works Ltd subsidiary Techno Industries Private Limited shifts registered office from Gujarat to Maharashtra
  • Order received from Regional Director, Ahmedabad, Gujarat, Ministry of Corporate Affairs
  • Shifting proposed for better operational convenience and efficiency
  • Effective date of shifting depends on filing of certified copy of the Order and issuance of fresh Certificate of Incorporation
  • No impact on the Listed entity

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Lloyds Steels Industries Ltd | Category: Subsidiaries

item.title: [MENONBE] Menon Bearings Ltd: Mr. R. D. Dixit Resigns as Managing Director, Mr. Arun Aradhye Appointed as New MD
item.description:
Menon Bearings Ltd announced the resignation of Mr. R. D. Dixit as Managing Director due to advancing age, effective close of business hours on 03.03.2026. The Board has appointed Mr. Arun Aradhye, Whole Time Director and CFO, as the new Managing Director for a term of 5 consecutive years, subject to approval of members of the Company. Mr. Chandrakant Ghatge has been appointed as the new Chief Financial Officer.

  • Mr. R. D. Dixit resigns as Managing Director of Menon Bearings Ltd.
  • Mr. Arun Aradhye appointed as the new Managing Director for a term of 5 years.
  • Mr. Chandrakant Ghatge appointed as the new Chief Financial Officer.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MENON BEARINGS LTD.-$ | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [JINDRILL] Jindal Drilling & Industries Ltd Clarifies Significant Increase in Security Volume
item.description:
Jindal Drilling & Industries Ltd has clarified a significant increase in the volume of the company's security across exchanges. The company has confirmed that all material information has been duly informed to the Stock Exchanges in compliance with SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. There is no other development or information required to be disclosed to stock exchanges.

  • Jindal Drilling & Industries Ltd has clarified a significant increase in the volume of the company's security across exchanges.
  • The company has confirmed that all material information has been duly informed to the Stock Exchanges.
  • This clarification is in response to a query from a stock exchange regarding the significant increase in the volume of the security.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JINDAL DRILLING & INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [GUJGAS] Gujarat Gas Ltd Announces Trading Window Closure
item.description:
Gujarat Gas Ltd, in compliance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, has announced the closure of the trading window for all designated persons and their immediate relatives. The closure will be in effect from Wednesday, 4th March, 2026 to Saturday, 14th March, 2026 (both days inclusive). This move is to regulate, monitor, and report trading by designated persons and their immediate relatives as per the company's Code of Conduct.

  • Trading window closure for all designated persons and their immediate relatives
  • Closure period from 4th March, 2026 to 14th March, 2026
  • Compliance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Gujarat Gas Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [NIITMTS] NIIT Learning Systems Ltd Announces Dissolution of MST UK Limited by March 2026
item.description:
NIIT Learning Systems Ltd (NLSL) has announced the dissolution of its wholly owned step down subsidiary, MST UK Limited, with effect from March 3, 2026. This decision was initially communicated on December 9, 2025, following an application by MST Holding GmbH, Germany, a step down wholly owned subsidiary of NLSL, to the relevant authority for the striking off and dissolution of MST UK Limited. The dissolution is not expected to impact the financial statements or operations of the Company and is part of a strategy to streamline and simplify the overall corporate structure. The dissolution does not affect the shareholding pattern of any other subsidiary or step-down subsidiary of the Company.

  • NIIT Learning Systems Ltd (NLSL) to dissolve its step down subsidiary, MST UK Limited, by March 3, 2026
  • The decision is part of a strategy to streamline and simplify the overall corporate structure
  • The dissolution is not expected to impact the financial statements or operations of the Company
  • The dissolution does not affect the shareholding pattern of any other subsidiary or step-down subsidiary of the Company
  • The decision follows an application by MST Holding GmbH, Germany, a step down wholly owned subsidiary of NLSL, to the relevant authority for the striking off and dissolution of MST UK Limited

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NIIT Learning Systems Ltd | Category: Subsidiaries

item.title: [BHAGIL] Temporary Disruption at Bhageria Industries' Tarapur Plant Due to Oleum Fumes Leakage, No Casualties Reported
item.description:
An incident occurred on 2nd March, 2026 at Bhageria Industries' manufacturing plant situated at Plot No. D-17, MIDC Tarapur, Boisar Industrial Area, Boisar, Palghar - 401506, Maharashtra. A measuring tank containing Oleum fell, resulting in the leakage and spread of Oleum fumes in the surrounding area, creating a temporary fog-like situation. The company managed to control the situation within time, ensuring no casualties or injuries to life. All personnel were safely evacuated from the affected area as a precautionary measure. The company is currently assessing the extent of the impact, if any.

  • Temporary disruption at Bhageria Industries' Tarapur plant
  • Incident involving the fall of a measuring tank containing Oleum
  • Leakage and spread of Oleum fumes in the surrounding area
  • No casualties or injuries reported
  • Company assessing the extent of the impact, if any

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Bhageria Industries Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [SCBL] Saptak Chem And Business Ltd Updates Contact Information
item.description:
Saptak Chem And Business Ltd has updated its official contact number to +91 8268382683, as per Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The numbers +91 9426839146 and +91 77788 78401 are no longer associated with the company. Stakeholders, investors, and the general public are requested to update their records accordingly.

  • Saptak Chem And Business Ltd has updated its official contact number
  • The new contact number is +91 8268382683
  • The numbers +91 9426839146 and +91 77788 78401 are no longer associated with the company
  • Stakeholders, investors, and the general public are requested to update their records

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Saptak Chem And Business Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [RATEGAIN] RateGain Consolidates MarTech Capabilities Under Sojern, Creating the World’s Largest Source of Travel Intent Data
item.description:
🔥 Trending

RateGain Travel Technologies Limited, a global leader of Al-powered SaaS solutions for the travel and hospitality industry, has announced the strategic unification of Adara and Sojern into a single global entity operating under the Sojern brand. This unified platform will deliver predictive traveler insights and multichannel engagement at global scale, bringing together complementary strengths and deepening product depth to reinforce differentiation in the global travel technology landscape.

  • RateGain consolidates Adara and Sojern under the Sojern brand, creating the world’s largest source of travel intent data.
  • The unified platform will deliver predictive traveler insights and multichannel engagement at global scale.
  • This strategic alignment brings together complementary strengths and deepens product depth in the global travel technology landscape.
  • Sojern will retain the Adara workforce under newly organized leadership.
  • RateGain is creating the industry's most comprehensive Al-powered growth platform to help hospitality and travel companies maximize direct bookings.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RateGain Travel Technologies Ltd | Category: New Launch
